/CAL: STATUS/DAWT/X: REPORT RECEIVED REFLECTS THAT DEFENDANT IS PROGRAM COMPLIANT AT JERRICHO HOUSE,/X: COUNSEL SPOKE TO JUDGE DARWIN & A NEW ORDERWAS SIGNED & FILED TODAY/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALLBE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASEAS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO CONTINUE PARTICIPATION IN RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM (JERICHO PROJECT)/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONT/DOPU: IN RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM/

/CAL: ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/INTC/X: DEFENDANT RECEIVED APPROVAL FROM THEJERRICHO PROJECT FACILITIES & ASSERTIVE CASE MANAGEMENT WILL BRING DEFENDANT TO THIS TREATMENT FACILITY,/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OFRELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALLBE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS INPLACE,/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO REMAIN WITHIN THE INTERIOR PREMISES OF JERRICHO PROJECT FACILITIES UNLESS AUTHORIZED BY A SFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE & MUST REMAIN IN RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT AT ALL TIMES/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA1:ROBERT EBER & OLGA EBER/SA2: 10 FERNWOOD DR, SF/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: STATUS/DOPU: IN RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM/

/CAL: PLACEMENT & PROGRAM STATUS/INTC/SHER/SHER2:12-29-21/BAIL:25000/BE/X:BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD ACM ELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD:ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET & JOIN/INTC/X:DEFENDANT HAS BEEN ACCEPTED IN THE LATINO COMMISSION PROGRAM TO ENTER TREATMENT AFTER HE HAS A CLEAN COVID TEST/CONTD:PROGRAM STATUS/X:DAW IF IN PROGRAM/
/CAL:ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/INTC/STWPX/X:AS A CONDITION OF BAIL, DEFENDANT TO PARTICIPATE IN A RESIDENTIAL PROGRAM THRU PTD, LATINO COMMISSION/VD:11-30-21 PRELIMINARY HEARING/CONTD:TO SET & JOIN/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT AND PLEA/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:12-03-21/X: THE 30TH LAST DAY IS 01-04-22 AND THE 60TH LAST DAY IS 01-18-22/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD:ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT ON 11-24-21 AND PRELIMINARY HEARING (TE 45 MIN)/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/X: SPECIAL APPEARENCE BY CONFLICT ATTORNEY RICHARDSHIKMAN/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES ACONFLICT,/CON:PAUL DENNISON/CAUSE/BAIL:50,000/X:BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT AND PLEA/DOP/
/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DAWT/FAVRPT/CONT/DOPU: DEFENDANT IS PROGRAMCOMPLIANT/
/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DAWT/CONT/DOPU: DEFENDANT IN RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM,/
/CAL: POSSIBLE DISPOSITION/DAWT/X: DEFENDANT IN JERICHO PROJECT,/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOPU: DEFENDANT IN JERICHO PROJECT,/
/CAL: STATUS/DAWT/CONTD: STATUS AND POSSIBLE DISPOSITION/DOPU: DEFENDANT IN RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM,/
/CAL: PLACEMENT & PROGRAM STATUS/DAWT/X: DEFENDANT IS STILL WAITING FOR ABED,/CONT/DOP/
/CAL: PROGRESS REPORT FOR INFORMAL DIVERSION (PROGRAM STATUS)/INTC/CONTD:PLACEMENT & PROGRAM STATUS/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET & JOIN/INTC/X:ANGELICA MENDEZ, CASE MANAGER, ADDRESSES THE COURT/CONT/DOP/
